ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., Naive Bayes, Decision Tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the algorithm was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the algorithm was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "algorithm1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first algorithm being compared */,
  "algorithm2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second algorithm being compared */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for comparison */,
  "statistic" REAL /* Statistic calculated for the comparison */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value calculated for the comparison */,
  "significant" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the difference is significant */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comparison was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comparison was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_algorithm1_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm1_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_algorithm2_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm2_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., algorithm 1 is better, algorithm 2 is better) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was added to the comparison */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
